# Pull Request

## Description
Brief description of changes made in this PR.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related Issues
Fixes # (issue number)
Related to # (issue number)

## Changes Made
Detailed list of changes:
- Changed X to Y
- Added support for Z
- Removed deprecated A

## Testing Performed
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] Added new tests for new functionality
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] MQTT command testing performed
- [ ] Escape room scenario testing completed
- [ ] Cross-browser testing completed

### Test Commands Used
```json
{"command": "test1"}
{"time": "05:00"}
```

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to show visual changes.

## Breaking Changes
If this is a breaking change, describe:
- What breaks
- How to migrate existing setups
- Impact on escape room operations

## Performance Impact
- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance improved
- [ ] Performance impact (describe below)

Performance details:
- Bundle size: before → after
- Load time: before → after
- Runtime performance: impact description

## Security Impact
- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security improved (describe)
- [ ] Potential security impact (describe and justify)

## Deployment Notes
Special considerations for deployment:
- Configuration changes needed
- Environment variable updates
- MQTT broker changes required
- Browser cache clearing recommended

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Code is well commented
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained (unless breaking change)

## Post-Merge Tasks
Tasks to complete after merging:
- [ ] Update production configuration
- [ ] Test in production environment
- [ ] Update operator documentation
- [ ] Monitor for issues

## Additional Notes
Any additional information for reviewers.
